rationale: Acting on Review 1 would trigger substantial debatable refactors (swap primary result to squareClass_of_sq_mem_fintype + direct induction on Fin/Fintype, change sqrtTower indexing, rewrite Quadratic quantifiers) that are stylistic preferences rather than material generality defects visible in the diff; Review 2's approve is sound because the PR already delivers the general Fintype case plus all specializations without wrong abstraction level or unused constraints. Both outcomes produce essentially the same merged PR.
